visa_types.name: Medical Treatment visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
The visa applicants have to present a valid travel medical insurance covering the entire period of planned stay with a minimum coverage of EUR 30,000. The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a Medical Treatment visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bfhwo500Zw5vQO8AhsYrR/ff9f38fcf423da87ee7e44f4ed18dd3a/medical-checklist.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.
Important Notes:
- The applicant bears responsibility concerning all content of the application.
- Applications cannot be submitted more than 3 months prior to departure.
- Processing can take up to 15 working days after receiving the application. Status queries will be responded after the above time frame only and shall be primarily addressed to the VFS-office of application
- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.
- However, in individual cases, that period may be extended up to 30 or to maximum of 60 calendar days particularly when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- The applicant declare being advised to submit full documentation according to the above checklist and that submission of incomplete or faulty documentation can be a reason for refusal of the application.
- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within
                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without
                                                                            a visa for 90 days within 180 day period. Citizens of the above mentioned countries who do not have biometric passports should apply for a Bulgarian visa as per the standard procedure.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[bgr > bhr > en > Table:Event or Conference Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
- Children below the age of 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.
visa_types.processing_time: Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing visit a member of his/her family or friends, who are residents in Bulgaria. This category of visa caters for people wishing visit Bulgaria to undergo a medical treatment.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters for people wishing visit a member of his/her family or friends, who are residents in Bulgaria. This category of visa caters for people wishing visit Bulgaria to undergo a medical treatment.

## Visa Fees

[bgr > bhr > en > Table:Event or Conference Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
- Children below the age of 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
The visa applicants have to present a valid travel medical insurance covering the entire period of planned stay with a minimum coverage of EUR 30,000. The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a Medical Treatment visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7bfhwo500Zw5vQO8AhsYrR/ff9f38fcf423da87ee7e44f4ed18dd3a/medical-checklist.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.
Important Notes:
- The applicant bears responsibility concerning all content of the application.
- Applications cannot be submitted more than 3 months prior to departure.
- Processing can take up to 15 working days after receiving the application. Status queries will be responded after the above time frame only and shall be primarily addressed to the VFS-office of application
- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.
- However, in individual cases, that period may be extended up to 30 or to maximum of 60 calendar days particularly when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- The applicant declare being advised to submit full documentation according to the above checklist and that submission of incomplete or faulty documentation can be a reason for refusal of the application.
- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within
                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without
                                                                            a visa for 90 days within 180 day period. Citizens of the above mentioned countries who do not have biometric passports should apply for a Bulgarian visa as per the standard procedure.

## Photo Specifications
A photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

## Download Forms
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6aD3QUHNqZFsvkMGzl9Qca/530f77e0612c8b8bcb29182da53fbb89/bulgaria-visa-application-form-28.06.2024.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A seasonal work visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Bulgaria for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people who are temporarily employed in the Republic of Bulgaria for a period up to 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:

## Visa Fees

Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.

The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a Seasonal Work Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4k0nhpnfMKhCM5U46dbqL3/cc9c8f1a43f9512b6d183f05c1630452/checklist-seasonal-work.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.

- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.

                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without
                                                                            a visa for 90 days within 180 day period. Citizens of the above mentioned countries who do not have biometric passports should apply for a Bulgarian visa as per the standard procedure.

## Photo Specifications
A photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

## Download Forms
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6aD3QUHNqZFsvkMGzl9Qca/530f77e0612c8b8bcb29182da53fbb89/bulgaria-visa-application-form-28.06.2024.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A tourist visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Bulgaria for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Bulgaria for touristic purposes either through buying a tour via an accredited travel agency, or through self-bookings of tickets and hotel.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A tourist visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Bulgaria for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Bulgaria for touristic purposes either through buying a tour via an accredited travel agency, or through self-bookings of tickets and hotel.

## Visa Fees

[bgr > bhr > en > Table:Event or Conference Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused

The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a Tourist visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1X1eRhuH75Rnav8UiOb7Oj/2bfde27a82ef6f90d065f4a0b804a6ea/tourism-checklist.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.

- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.

- The applicant declare being advised to submit full documentation according to the above checklist and that submission of incomplete or faulty documentation can be a reason for refusal of the application.
- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within
                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without
                                                                            a visa for 90 days within 180 day period. Citizens of the above mentioned countries who do not have biometric passports should apply for a Bulgarian visa as per the standard procedure.

- Taken against a light background

- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons

- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A transit visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to transit through Bulgaria and the Schengen area to their final destination. The visa is only valid for two days in which the applicant must enter Bulgaria and leave the Schengen area by the end of the second day.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A transit visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to transit through Bulgaria and the Schengen area to their final destination. The visa is only valid for two days in which the applicant must enter Bulgaria and leave the Schengen area by the end of the second day.

## Visa Fees

[bgr > bhr > en > Table:Event or Conference Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:

The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a Transit visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4lh59yVCUEeg6gdZAGVFmF/d4504bc70d27c82e1171c38d32c8118e/checklist-transit-visa.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.

- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.
- However, in individual cases, that period may be extended up to 30 or to maximum of 60 calendar days particularly when further scrutiny of the application is needed.

- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within
                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without

## Photo Specifications

- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.
- However, in individual cases, that period may be extended up to 30 or to maximum of 60 calendar days particularly when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- The applicant declare being advised to submit full documentation according to the above checklist and that submission of incomplete or faulty documentation can be a reason for refusal of the application.
- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A family visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Bulgaria for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people who are family members of a Bulgarian citizen or of another country from the Schengen area.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A family visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Bulgaria for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people who are family members of a Bulgarian citizen or of another country from the Schengen area.

## Visa Fees

[bgr > bhr > en > Table:EU Family Member > Visa Fees 1]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of BHD 9.8 (Inclusive of 10% VAT) in addition to the visa fees.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Bahraini Dinar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee, service fee and the logistic fee is paid in cash at the visa application centre and is non-refundable in case the visa is refused
- Children below the age of 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However VFS Global service charges will be applicable.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/ind/en/bgr/travel-insurance).
The visa applicants have to present a valid travel medical insurance covering the entire period of planned stay with a minimum coverage of EUR 30,000. The insurance must be able to cover all expenses that may be incurred in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical care and / or hospital treatment in case of emergency or death on the territory of the Republic of Bulgaria. 
Please see the checklist for a EU Family member visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1foxQGtSlayXZ6i8WSo3SA/c7cbe6ed6040c7b488834f8417088069/checklist-eu-family.pdf) with the complete list of requirements.
Important Notes:
- The applicant bears responsibility concerning all content of the application.
- Applications cannot be submitted more than 3 months prior to departure.
- Processing can take up to 15 working days after receiving the application. Status queries will be responded after the above time frame only and shall be primarily addressed to the VFS-office of application
- In case an application is lodged less than 15 working days before departure, a timely completion of the visa process cannot be guaranteed.
- However, in individual cases, that period may be extended up to 30 or to maximum of 60 calendar days particularly when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
- The applicant declare being advised to submit full documentation according to the above checklist and that submission of incomplete or faulty documentation can be a reason for refusal of the application.
- Applicants are advised that during the examination of an application, Embassy may request additional documents. The Embassy may call applicants for an interview if deemed necessary.
- A short-stay visa for the purpose of a planned stay is issued to a foreigner who enters the country once, twice or repeatedly for a total period of residence up to 90 days within
                                                                            every 6 months from the date of first entry.
- Citizens of Moldova, Georgia, Montenegro, Macedonia, Albania, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Ukraine who have biometric foreign passports can enter and stay in Bulgaria without
                                                                            a visa for 90 days within 180 day period. Citizens of the above mentioned countries who do not have biometric passports should apply for a Bulgarian visa as per the standard procedure.

## Photo Specifications
A photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably maximum 6 months old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed

## Processing Time
Each application my take an around 15 working days excluding the day of submission

## Download Forms
Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6aD3QUHNqZFsvkMGzl9Qca/530f77e0612c8b8bcb29182da53fbb89/bulgaria-visa-application-form-28.06.2024.pdf)

Overview
